summary: SPK RC 40 sua lifecycle native tren Synology de package restart dung cach, tranh giu lai process cu lam worker/proxy tiep tuc chay sai code.
changes: Worker ffmpeg-only gio luu HLS vao OUTPUT_DIR/<renditionId>/... dung voi cach API /hls doc file tren SPK native, tranh 720p va 1080p cung ghi vao mot thu muc goc.
Rendition tren SQLite/SPK sau khi transcode xong se luon tro ve /hls/<renditionId>/master.m3u8 thay vi file://..., nen UI va player su dung cung mot duong proxy xac thuc.
Bootstrap native gio thoat han process API khi nhan SIGTERM/SIGINT sau khi dung worker inline, tranh tinh trang package restart nhung process cu van song va tiep tuc phuc vu code cu.
